paper_title: Machine Learning-Based 30-Day Readmission Prediction for Heart Failure Patients
abstract: This study developed a machine learning-based 30-day readmission prediction model using electronic health records from 12,000 heart failure patients. We compared five gradient boosting frameworks and evaluated their performance with AUROC, AUPRC, and calibration metrics.

claims.claim_text: Heart failure affects approximately 6.2 million adults in the United States and imposes a significant healthcare burden.

claim_context.abstract: This study developed a machine learning-based 30-day readmission prediction model using electronic health records from 12,000 heart failure patients. We compared five gradient boosting frameworks and evaluated their performance with AUROC, AUPRC, and calibration metrics.
claim_context.paragraph: Heart failure affects approximately 6.2 million adults in the United States, imposing a significant burden on healthcare systems. Thirty-day readmission rates remain high despite various intervention programs.

claims.original_sentence: Heart failure affects approximately 6.2 million adults in the United States, imposing a significant burden on healthcare systems.
claims.reason: 미국 내 심부전 유병 규모(6.2 million)와 의료체계 부담은 역학 통계에 근거한 정량적 사실이므로 근거 문헌 인용이 필요합니다.

claims.claim_text: Machine learning models can outperform traditional risk scores such as the LACE index for predicting readmissions.

claim_context.abstract: This study developed a machine learning-based 30-day readmission prediction model using electronic health records from 12,000 heart failure patients. We compared five gradient boosting frameworks and evaluated their performance with AUROC, AUPRC, and calibration metrics.
claim_context.paragraph: Early identification of patients at high risk of readmission could enable targeted interventions and reduce healthcare costs. Previous studies have shown that machine learning models can outperform traditional risk scores such as the LACE index in predicting readmissions.

claims.original_sentence: Previous studies have shown that machine learning models can outperform traditional risk scores such as the LACE index in predicting readmissions.
claims.reason: ‘선행연구에서 ML이 LACE보다 우수’는 명시적으로 기존 연구 결과를 요약하는 문장이므로 해당 비교를 보고한 논문들을 인용해야 합니다.

claims.claim_text: CatBoost uses ordered boosting and symmetric decision trees and is robust for heterogeneous features with native categorical support.

claim_context.abstract: This study developed a machine learning-based 30-day readmission prediction model using electronic health records from 12,000 heart failure patients. We compared five gradient boosting frameworks and evaluated their performance with AUROC, AUPRC, and calibration metrics.
claim_context.paragraph: We evaluated five gradient boosting frameworks: XGBoost, LightGBM, CatBoost, TabNet, and a tuned random forest baseline. Among the algorithms tested, CatBoost employs ordered boosting and symmetric decision trees, offering robust handling of heterogeneous features and native categorical support. LightGBM uses histogram-based splitting for faster training, while XGBoost remains the most widely adopted in clinical prediction studies.

claims.original_sentence: Among the algorithms tested, CatBoost employs ordered boosting and symmetric decision trees, offering robust handling of heterogeneous features and native categorical support.
claims.reason: 알고리즘의 핵심 설계(ordered boosting, symmetric trees)와 장점(범주형 지원 등)은 해당 방법론 논문/공식 문서에 근거해야 하는 기술적 사실입니다.

claims.claim_text: Gradient boosting methods generally outperform logistic regression in clinical prediction, as shown in recent benchmarking studies.

claim_context.abstract: This study developed a machine learning-based 30-day readmission prediction model using electronic health records from 12,000 heart failure patients. We compared five gradient boosting frameworks and evaluated their performance with AUROC, AUPRC, and calibration metrics.
claim_context.paragraph: The superior performance of gradient boosting methods over logistic regression aligns with recent benchmarking studies in clinical prediction. However, the marginal improvement over simpler models suggests that feature engineering may be more impactful than model selection in this domain.

claims.original_sentence: The superior performance of gradient boosting methods over logistic regression aligns with recent benchmarking studies in clinical prediction.
claims.reason: ‘최근 벤치마킹 연구와 일치’는 외부 연구 결과를 근거로 한 비교 주장입니다. 어떤 벤치마킹 연구를 의미하는지 구체 인용이 필요합니다.

claims.claim_text: Social determinants of health significantly influence readmission risk.

claim_context.abstract: This study developed a machine learning-based 30-day readmission prediction model using electronic health records from 12,000 heart failure patients. We compared five gradient boosting frameworks and evaluated their performance with AUROC, AUPRC, and calibration metrics.
claim_context.paragraph: This study has several limitations. The retrospective design limits causal inference. Additionally, our dataset lacked granular social determinants of health data, which have been shown to significantly influence readmission risk. The use of a single-center dataset may limit generalizability.

claims.original_sentence: Additionally, our dataset lacked granular social determinants of health data, which have been shown to significantly influence readmission risk.
claims.reason: 사회적 건강결정요인(SDOH)이 재입원 위험에 유의미한 영향을 준다는 것은 선행연구 근거가 필요한 경험적 주장입니다. 특히 ‘shown to’ 표현은 구체 문헌 인용이 필수입니다.

claims.claim_text: Thirty-day readmission rates for heart failure remain high despite intervention programs.

claim_context.abstract: This study developed a machine learning-based 30-day readmission prediction model using electronic health records from 12,000 heart failure patients. We compared five gradient boosting frameworks and evaluated their performance with AUROC, AUPRC, and calibration metrics.
claim_context.paragraph: Heart failure affects approximately 6.2 million adults in the United States, imposing a significant burden on healthcare systems. Thirty-day readmission rates remain high despite various intervention programs.

claims.original_sentence: Thirty-day readmission rates remain high despite various intervention programs.
claims.reason: 재입원율이 ‘여전히 높다’는 평가는 기존 관찰연구/정책 보고서 등 근거가 필요합니다. 또한 ‘중재 프로그램에도 불구하고’라는 비교 주장에는 선행연구 인용이 요구됩니다.

claims.claim_text: LightGBM uses histogram-based splitting for faster training.

claim_context.abstract: This study developed a machine learning-based 30-day readmission prediction model using electronic health records from 12,000 heart failure patients. We compared five gradient boosting frameworks and evaluated their performance with AUROC, AUPRC, and calibration metrics.
claim_context.paragraph: We evaluated five gradient boosting frameworks: XGBoost, LightGBM, CatBoost, TabNet, and a tuned random forest baseline. Among the algorithms tested, CatBoost employs ordered boosting and symmetric decision trees, offering robust handling of heterogeneous features and native categorical support. LightGBM uses histogram-based splitting for faster training, while XGBoost remains the most widely adopted in clinical prediction studies.

claims.original_sentence: LightGBM uses histogram-based splitting for faster training, while XGBoost remains the most widely adopted in clinical prediction studies.
claims.reason: LightGBM의 학습 방식(히스토그램 기반 분할)과 속도 이점은 구현/방법론에 대한 사실 진술이므로 원 논문 또는 공식 문서 인용이 필요합니다.

claims.claim_text: Key predictors identified are consistent with prior literature on heart failure readmission risk factors.

claim_context.abstract: This study developed a machine learning-based 30-day readmission prediction model using electronic health records from 12,000 heart failure patients. We compared five gradient boosting frameworks and evaluated their performance with AUROC, AUPRC, and calibration metrics.
claim_context.paragraph: Feature importance analysis revealed that the number of prior hospitalizations in the past year, serum sodium levels, and ejection fraction were the top three predictors. These findings are consistent with prior literature on heart failure readmission risk factors.

claims.original_sentence: These findings are consistent with prior literature on heart failure readmission risk factors.
claims.reason: 본 연구 결과를 ‘선행문헌과 일치’한다고 해석하는 문장이므로, 해당 위험요인을 보고한 대표 연구들을 인용해 정당화해야 합니다.

claims.claim_text: XGBoost is the most widely adopted method in clinical prediction studies.

claim_context.abstract: This study developed a machine learning-based 30-day readmission prediction model using electronic health records from 12,000 heart failure patients. We compared five gradient boosting frameworks and evaluated their performance with AUROC, AUPRC, and calibration metrics.
claim_context.paragraph: We evaluated five gradient boosting frameworks: XGBoost, LightGBM, CatBoost, TabNet, and a tuned random forest baseline. Among the algorithms tested, CatBoost employs ordered boosting and symmetric decision trees, offering robust handling of heterogeneous features and native categorical support. LightGBM uses histogram-based splitting for faster training, while XGBoost remains the most widely adopted in clinical prediction studies.

claims.original_sentence: LightGBM uses histogram-based splitting for faster training, while XGBoost remains the most widely adopted in clinical prediction studies.
claims.reason: ‘임상 예측 연구에서 가장 널리 채택’은 문헌 동향에 대한 주장으로, 체계적 문헌고찰/서베이/벤치마킹 연구 등 근거 인용이 필요합니다.

claims.claim_text: Model transportability is a known challenge in clinical machine learning, motivating the need for multi-center validation.

claim_context.abstract: This study developed a machine learning-based 30-day readmission prediction model using electronic health records from 12,000 heart failure patients. We compared five gradient boosting frameworks and evaluated their performance with AUROC, AUPRC, and calibration metrics.
claim_context.paragraph: Our results should be interpreted with caution given the single-center study design. Multi-center validation is needed before clinical deployment, as model transportability remains a known challenge in clinical machine learning.

claims.original_sentence: Multi-center validation is needed before clinical deployment, as model transportability remains a known challenge in clinical machine learning.
claims.reason: 임상 ML에서 모델 전이가능성(transportability)이 ‘잘 알려진 문제’라는 진술은 방법론/재현성 문헌에 근거해야 하므로 인용이 필요합니다.

claims.claim_text: The OMOP Common Data Model is used to standardize clinical variables across institutions.

claim_context.abstract: This study developed a machine learning-based 30-day readmission prediction model using electronic health records from 12,000 heart failure patients. We compared five gradient boosting frameworks and evaluated their performance with AUROC, AUPRC, and calibration metrics.
claim_context.paragraph: Feature engineering was performed using the OMOP Common Data Model to standardize clinical variables across institutions. We extracted 142 features including demographics, vital signs, laboratory values, medication history, and prior utilization patterns.

claims.original_sentence: Feature engineering was performed using the OMOP Common Data Model to standardize clinical variables across institutions.
claims.reason: OMOP CDM을 기관 간 표준화 목적에 사용한다는 설명은 공인된 데이터 표준/컨소시엄 문서에 근거해야 하므로 관련 레퍼런스가 필요합니다.

claims.claim_text: Feature engineering may be more impactful than model selection for readmission prediction (or similar clinical prediction tasks).

claim_context.abstract: This study developed a machine learning-based 30-day readmission prediction model using electronic health records from 12,000 heart failure patients. We compared five gradient boosting frameworks and evaluated their performance with AUROC, AUPRC, and calibration metrics.
claim_context.paragraph: The superior performance of gradient boosting methods over logistic regression aligns with recent benchmarking studies in clinical prediction. However, the marginal improvement over simpler models suggests that feature engineering may be more impactful than model selection in this domain.

claims.original_sentence: However, the marginal improvement over simpler models suggests that feature engineering may be more impactful than model selection in this domain.
claims.reason: 본 연구 관찰에서 도출한 해석이지만, ‘이 도메인에서 일반적으로’라는 일반화가 포함되어 있어 관련 선행연구(특징공학 vs 모델 선택 영향)를 인용하면 주장 설득력이 높아집니다.
